system.description: A mind opened by the impossible geometry between stars. Void-Touched Savants read pressure changes in thought, carry a sliver of dead-space calm, and can overchannel psyche at real personal risk.

grantedFeatures.name: Psionic Intuition
grantedFeatures.description: Once per scene, ask the GM one yes/no question about a nearby psychic trace, hidden motive, or impossible phenomenon.

grantedFeatures.name: Void Resistance
grantedFeatures.description: Gain +1 defense against psyche-based attacks and environmental effects tied to vacuum, deep space, or psychic dread.

grantedFeatures.name: Psychic Overchannel
grantedFeatures.description: Before rolling a Psyche or Focus skill, take 1 Psyche Damage to increase the skill die one step for that roll.
